enemy.name: Rust-Eaten Automaton
enemy.weakness: Steam-Pressure Wrench strikes to the exposed joints

pickup.name: Superheated Lubricant
pickup.effect: Increases movement speed and weapon swing velocity

encounters.trigger: Disabling the automaton causes a pressure valve to burst, opening the hatch to the Gear Grinder

enemy.name: Mechanical Sentinel
enemy.weakness: Slippery surfaces caused by Superheated Lubricant

encounters.hazard: Rotating floor gears that inflict bleed damage

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Permanently reduces enemy armor rating

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel releases a pulley system that lowers a bridge to the Boiler Core

enemy.name: Overloaded Steam-Bot
enemy.weakness: Corrosive Acid Vial applied to its cooling pipes

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Rod
pickup.effect: Channels electricity to deal massive static damage

encounters.trigger: The explosion of the Steam-Bot shatters the glass ceiling, revealing the Boss Chamber

boss.name: General Cogsworth Prime
boss.weakness: Conductive Copper Rod used as a lightning rod during his electric charge phase
boss.victory_condition: Overload Cogsworth's internal capacitor until he undergoes total meltdown

output.objective: Navigate the malfunctioning clocktower and neutralize the rogue commander bot.
output.reward: Master Clockmaker Badge and the Blueprint for the Galvanic Sledgehammer

pickup.name: Vial of Corrosive Lubricant
pickup.effect: Dissolves reinforced copper plating

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the automaton releases a steam valve, opening the heavy brass doors to the Gear Hall.

pickup.name: Insulated Copper Relay
pickup.effect: Allows handling of exposed high-voltage conduits

enemy.name: Shambling Boiler Golem
enemy.weakness: Tesla Wrench impact to the pilot hatch

pickup.name: Frequency Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Disrupts ultrasonic command signals

encounters.trigger: The Golem falls into the main furnace, triggering an emergency override that unlocks the Warden's Observatory.

boss.name: The Great Chronometer Warden
boss.weakness: Frequency Tuning Fork used on the central glass casing
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the glass casing to expose the core and strike it with the Tesla Wrench.

output.objective: Uncover the secret behind the Sanatorium's missing staff by reaching the central brain.
output.reward: The Master Blueprint for the Perpetual Motion Engine.

pickup.name: Vial of Corrosive Acid
pickup.effect: Dissolves copper plating and joints

encounters.trigger: Destroying the dog's core causes a pressure surge, unlocking the heavy bulkhead leading to the Silo.

pickup.name: High-Frequency Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Shatters reinforced glass and disrupts sonic sensors

encounters.trigger: The automaton's death cry emits a frequency that resonates with the elevator mechanism, calling it down.

pickup.name: Master Control Override Key
pickup.effect: Bypasses the security lock on the Main Vault

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Override Key into the central console opens the door to the Arch-Engineer's Sanctum.

boss.name: Arch-Engineer Malphas
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Override Key into the boss's central boiler to trigger a total meltdown.

output.objective: Infiltrate the high-security vault and assassinate the Arch-Engineer to halt the production of the gear-virus.
output.reward: The Clockwork Heart and the title of Shadow of the Spire.

output.setting: The Rust-Choked Ironworks of New Aetheria

pickup.name: Brass Insulation Gloves
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to electrical feedback and heat

encounters.trigger: The sentry's core explosion unlocks the elevator to the Smelting Floor.

pickup.name: Overcharged Capacitance Coil
pickup.effect: Triples the electrical output of the next storm spell

encounters.trigger: The Golem falls through the floor, revealing the entrance to the Clockwork Heart.

boss.name: Grand Architect Malphas

output.objective: Infiltrate the Ironworks and disable the Aetheric Reactor to stop the city-wide blackout.
output.reward: The Master Key of Aetheria and the title of High Stormcaller.

output.objective: Retrieve the Primal Geode from the heart of the sunken cathedral.
output.reward: Mastery of Tectonic Resonance and the Steam-Walker mount.

output.setting: The Sunless Trench, a pressure-crushed graveyard of ancient leviathans

pickup.name: Vial of Bioluminescence
pickup.effect: Reveals invisible spirits and illuminates dark tunnels

encounters.trigger: Collecting the vial awakens the Guardian of the Altar in the next chamber.

pickup.name: Ossified Marrow Dagger
pickup.effect: A secondary ritual blade used for piercing spectral armor

encounters.trigger: Slaying the wraith causes the temple floor to collapse into the Maw of the Deep.

pickup.name: Essence of the Void Heart
pickup.effect: Grants temporary invulnerability to crushing depths

encounters.trigger: Consuming the Void Heart summons the Final Leviathan from the trench floor.

boss.name: Krakos the Soul-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Use the Void Heart to bypass the boss's internal defenses and shatter its core.

output.objective: Descend into the Sunless Trench and harvest the soul of the ancient leviathan to fuel your necromantic ritual.
output.reward: The Crown of the Tides, granting permanent control over undead marine life.

pickup.name: Ancient Sealant
pickup.effect: Instantly repairs suit integrity for the final fight

encounters.trigger: Sealing the cathedral doors traps the player with the Abyssal Leviathan

boss.name: Abyssal Leviathan
boss.weakness: Vulnerability to the Ancient Sealant's chemical bonding property
boss.victory_condition: Seal the Leviathan's primary breathing vents using the Ancient Sealant

output.objective: Traverse the desolate depths to prevent the rupture of the Great Barrier
output.reward: Title: Warden of the Eternal Depths and the Gravity-Defying Anchor

normalized.setting: The Abyss of the Sunken Citadel

enemy.name: Bleached Siren
enemy.weakness: Pressure-Wrought Harpoon through the vocal sac

pickup.name: Bioluminescent Bile
pickup.effect: Corrodes chitinous armor on contact

encounters.trigger: Opening the siren's gate causes an acoustic boom that awakens the Trench Stalker

enemy.name: Trench Stalker
enemy.weakness: Bioluminescent Bile applied to its shell

pickup.name: Thermal Core
pickup.effect: Temporarily superheats the player's weapon

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the core destabilizes the sea floor, revealing the path to the Void Maw

enemy.name: Void Maw
enemy.weakness: The Thermal Core's heat against its ice-veined heart

pickup.name: Ancient Sealant
pickup.effect: Instantly repairs suit integrity for the final fight

encounters.trigger: Sealing the cathedral doors traps the player with the Abyssal Leviathan

boss.name: Abyssal Leviathan
boss.weakness: Vulnerability to the Ancient Sealant's chemical bonding property
boss.victory_condition: Seal the Leviathan's primary breathing vents using the Ancient Sealant

normalized.objective: Traverse the desolate depths to prevent the rupture of the Great Barrier
normalized.reward: Title: Warden of the Eternal Depths and the Gravity-Defying Anchor

pickup.name: Prism Shell
pickup.effect: Refracts light to create dazzling distractions

encounters.trigger: Opening the Prism Shell releases a beam of light that points toward the Sunken Tea Party.

pickup.name: Giggling Pearl
pickup.effect: Emits high-pitched sound waves that shatter illusions

encounters.trigger: The Giggling Pearl's laughter echoes through a pipe, leading the player to the Crystal Grotto.

pickup.name: Ever-Glowing Starfish
pickup.effect: Provides constant illumination and reveals hidden paths

encounters.trigger: Placing the Starfish on the altar opens the grand gates to the King's Ballroom.

boss.name: Barnaby the Bubbling Behemoth
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ever-Glowing Starfish to blind Barnaby, then trap him in a giant mirage bubble.

output.objective: Navigate the whimsical depths to recover the Royal Tea Set and soothe the grumpy sea creatures.
output.reward: The Title of Master Underwater Illusionist and a permanent Speed Boost fins upgrade.
